scoring.label: 重要度，不等同于事实真伪
scoring.formula: 基础分 + 来源 + 主题优先级 + 时效 + 影响信号 + 相关性 + 证据完整度 + 多源印证 - 编辑降权
scoring.confidenceNote: 置信度仅反映已收录来源的权重与独立来源数量，不替代事实核查。

brief.headline: Skyroot Aerospace reaches orbit on first Vikram-1 launch
brief.summary: 本期从 9 个公开信源筛选出 10 条重点事件，覆盖科技、AI、航空航天、安全动态与无人系统。
signals: 航空航天：Skyroot Aerospace’s Vikram-1 rocket successfully lifted off on its inaugural flight July 18, becoming the first commercial Indian rocket to reach orbit.
航空航天：The maximum value of the National Security Space Launch Phase 3 Lane 1 contract was raised from $5.6 billion to $17 billion
